name: Lemon-Berry Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 cup fresh blueberries (use frozen if not in season)
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. In a large bowl, mix oil, sugar, lemon extract, and egg whites. In another bowl, combine flour with baking powder. Add the flour mixture to the sugar mixture alternately with milk, stirring just until blended. Fold in blueberries and lemon rind. Pour batter into a 9 by 5-inch loaf pan coated with non-stick cooking spray and dusted with flour. Bake for 40-50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Immediately poke holes at 1-inch intervals on top of the bread and pour the lemon glaze over. For the glaze, combine sugar and lemon juice in a small saucepan and heat until the sugar is dissolved.
